description: Wrong denominator — KM analysis for PFS uses the Safety population instead of the ITT population as specified in the SAP.

detection_expectation.rule_violated: R-DENOM-02: TC-001 must use ITT population per SAP
detection_expectation.correct_action: Flag population error: KM used Safety (SAFFL) instead of ITT (ITTFL) per SAP

metadata.notes: Critical error: using Safety for efficacy analysis could change conclusions if Safety excludes randomized subjects who never received treatment
